schema.description: Extract contact details, decision maker info, identify the Top Offer (focusing on bookable courses, seminars, camps, or events with fixed times), and determine the business niches based on this offer. IMPORTANT: All free-text answers MUST be written in German.

nicheBroad.description: A broad category for the business based on their top bookable offer (e.g., 'Bildung', 'Gesundheit & Fitness', 'Beratung', 'Handwerk').

nicheSpecific.description: A more specific category for the business based on their top bookable offer (e.g., 'Sprachschule', 'Yogastudio', 'Akademie', 'Bootsfahrschule', 'Seminaranbieter').

nicheVerySpecific.description: A highly specific, long-tail niche description based on their top bookable offer (e.g., 'Business-Englisch Kurse für IT-Fachkräfte', 'Pränatales Yoga Retreats für Schwangere', 'Agile Transformation Seminare für den Mittelstand', 'Sportbootführerschein Binnen und See Ausbildung').

companyName.description: The official name of the company (e.g. GmbH, AG, etc.). Optional.

companyType.description: The legal form / company type of the business (e.g. 'GmbH', 'e.V.', 'AG', 'UG', 'Einzelunternehmen', 'GbR', 'OHG', 'KG', 'gGmbH'). Look in the imprint (Impressum), footer, or about page. Optional.

address.description: The postal address of the company. Optional.

decisionMaker.description: The best person to contact for business decisions. Look for the CEO (Geschäftsführer), Owner (Inhaber), or Founder. If not available, look for Head of Department or similar high-level roles. Optional.

role.description: The job title (e.g. CEO, Geschäftsführer). Optional.

email.description: Direct email of the decision maker. Optional.

phone.description: Direct phone number of the decision maker. Format: International format (e.g. +49 30 123456). Optional.

webDesignAgency.description: Information about the agency that built the website, usually found in the footer (e.g. 'Made by...', 'Webdesign by...'). Important: We need the web design agency which build the site and not the author of the theme. Do not include generic homepage builders like Jimdo, Wix, Squarespace, etc. Optional.

url.description: The URL of the web design agency. Optional.

topOffer.description: Identify ONE single, concrete, purchasable 'Top Offer' that represents a bookable, timed event (such as a course, seminar, camp, workshop, retreat, or training) with fixed dates or times. This must be an offer that requires participant management and a booking system (like Butlerapp). Look for the 'Hero' course or seminar featured on the homepage. Do NOT simply pick the most expensive one. Do NOT summarize multiple offers (e.g. 'Various Yoga Classes'), instead pick the specific core one (e.g. 'Hatha Yoga 10-Week Course').

name.description: The specific name of the single offer (e.g. 'Open Water Diver Course', 'Full Body Massage 60min'). (in German)

price.description: The price of this specific offer in Euros (e.g. 2990). Do not include currency symbols.

description.description: A detailed description of exactly what is included in this specific offer. Do not list general services.

link.description: The specific URL to this offer's page.

bookingPage.description: Link to the booking page, contact form, or checkout page specifically for this offer.

reason.description: Reason why this specific item was selected as the top offer (e.g. 'Featured prominently on homepage', 'Core business service'). (in German)

top5Offers.description: A bulleted list of the top 5 offers found on the website. Each bullet point must include the Offer Name, Price (if available), Appointment info (if relevant), and a short description of what it is. Focus on bookable courses, seminars, and events.
